thresholds.label: Full strength
additionalEffects: Frayed zone environmental effects suppressed within ward

thresholds.label: Strong
additionalEffects: Minor Fray creatures (CR 1/4 and below) can slip through at night (sunset to sunrise)

thresholds.label: Weakened
additionalEffects: Moderate Fray creatures (CR 1 and below) can enter
Thin-place effects manifest at ward edges (fog, sound distortion)

thresholds.label: Failing
additionalEffects: Major Fray creatures (CR 3 and below) can enter at any time
Environmental anomalies inside the ward (time stutters, gravity shifts)

thresholds.label: Critical
additionalEffects: Settlement is effectively a thin place
Fray exposure saves required for long rests inside ward (DC 10)

thresholds.label: Collapsed
additionalEffects: Full Frayed zone rules apply if surrounding area is Frayed

events.description: Binding ceremony performed with complete Song
Binding ceremony performed with partial Song
Binding ceremony failed — destabilizes the ward
Wardweaver performs daily maintenance — prevents natural decay
No Wardweaver, no daily maintenance — natural decay per week
Wardweaver died without successor — accelerated decay per month
Player restored a nearby Loom Stone — one-time bonus
Major Fray creature incursion repelled — ward responds to successful defense
Major Fray creature incursion went undefended
Player completed major quest in region — weave stabilizes regionally
